caption: A man with a white beard and glasses, wearing a light-colored Nehru jacket over a long-sleeved shirt, stands behind a wooden podium delivering a speech. He is positioned against a textured, dark green wall with geometric recessed patterns. Two microphones are mounted on the podium, angled toward him. In the background, a vertical decorative pillar with gold accents and small pink floral arrangements is visible. As the sequence progresses, the man shifts his expression and gestures slightly with his hands. He initially looks toward the right, then turns his gaze more directly toward the audience, maintaining his position behind the podium throughout the clip. No text or logos are visible on the screen.
